repair_candidate.summary: A narrow follow-up fix path is warranted for the #82121 truncation-sentinel family because #94094 fails proof and has an unresolved code-fence preservation finding, while #93694 contains safer provenance-backed hydration behavior but is too broad for an automatic merge recommendation in this shard.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): hydrate truncated session replies without stripping user text
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Fixes #82121.

This follows the safer provenance-backed direction from #93694 and avoids the global sanitizer stripping approach that left #94094 with a code-fence preservation blocker. Credit to @markoub for the session hydration path and @MoerAI for the sanitizer regression work.

Validation:
- pnpm test src/agents/run-wait.test.ts
- pnpm test src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts
- pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers.sanitizeuserfacingtext.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Credit MoerAI for #94094's sanitizer-focused reproduction and tests.
Credit markoub for #93694's provenance-backed session-reply hydration approach.
